steps.name: Given the user is on the Cortex login page
Wait for selector locator('button:has-text("ลงชื่อเข้าใช้")')
Click locator('button:has-text("ลงชื่อเข้าใช้")')
When the user enters credentials and logs in as "user1"
Then they should be redirected to the applications page and the dashboard should be visible
Wait for selector locator('div').filter({ hasText: /^ห้องยา$/ }).first()
Click locator('div').filter({ hasText: /^ห้องยา$/ }).first()
Fill "ห้องยา A" locator('input.ant-select-input').first()
Wait for selector locator('.ant-select-item-option, [role="option"], .ant-select-item-option-content').filter({ hasText: 'ห้องยา A' }).first()
Click locator('.ant-select-item-option, [role="option"], .ant-select-item-option-content').filter({ hasText: 'ห้องยา A' }).first()
Click locator('button').filter({ hasText: /(Create|เพิ่ม|Create medication master)/i }).first()
Given the user is logged in and navigates to the Create Medication page
